description_long: This ornate sconce features a central gold-toned stem with elaborate scrollwork arms radiating outward, each arm topped with a decorative finial and supporting a faux candle or bulb holder. The arms are adorned with intricate leaf motifs and are connected by draped strands of faceted crystal beads, adding a touch of elegance and sparkle. The overall structure is symmetrical, with five main arms and a central vertical column, all finished in a metallic gold color. The crystal beads are clear or slightly tinted, catching and refracting light for a luxurious effect. The sconce is designed to be mounted on a wall, with its decorative elements facing outward to maximize visual impact. The craftsmanship and detailing suggest a vintage or classical European influence, suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: An ornate gold-toned wall sconce with five arms, crystal bead drapes, and intricate scrollwork and leaf motifs, exuding a vintage, luxurious style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of five arms, crystal bead drapes, and detailed scrollwork.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more depth in the scrollwork and the layering of the crystal bead strands.
description_view_2: Side-angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the dimensionality of the decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the symmetry and ornate details from another angle.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage, classical European style with ornate scrollwork, leaf motifs, and draped crystal beads, evoking a sense of luxury and old-world charm.
